overall.description: A third-person perspective video game scene showing a female character in a long dark dress walking through a foggy, eerie forest at night. The character traverses a dirt path past stone walls, iron lamp posts, and dead trees, eventually approaching a stone cottage and ascending steps toward a gnarled tree archway. The atmosphere is dark and misty with a blue-purple color palette.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy forest path with stone wall and iron lamp post

events.description: character passes the warm glow of the iron lamp post, entering darker fog

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the forest path away from the lamp post toward the open woods

entered.detail: low stone wall running alongside the left side of the path
tall black iron lamp post with warm yellow lantern light
twisted bare trees with no leaves silhouetted in the fog
distant dark mountain shape barely visible through the mist

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking along a foggy forest path at night, passing a lit iron lamp post on the right and a stone wall on the left. The environment is dark and misty with bare twisted trees visible through the blue-purple fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: open foggy forest with distant stone cottage

events.description: stone cottage with glowing windows emerges from the fog on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path toward the distant stone cottage visible through the trees

entered.detail: small stone house with lit windows and chimney visible through the fog
clusters of white flowers growing alongside the path
mysterious warm lights floating in the foggy distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through open forest as the stone wall and lamp post recede behind. A stone cottage with glowing windows gradually becomes visible through the fog on the right, while white flowers and mysterious distant lights appear in the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone cottage approach with ascending steps and tree arch

events.description: dark figure visible standing motionless on the cottage chimney
character begins ascending stone steps leading past the cottage

agents.ego_description: walking up stone steps past the cottage toward a large gnarled tree archway

notable_agents.action: dark figure standing motionless on the cottage chimney

entered.detail: weathered stone steps ascending the path past the cottage
large gnarled dead tree forming an arch over the path ahead
second iron lamp post with warm light on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the stone cottage, passing close to its walls while ascending stone steps. A dark figure stands ominously on the chimney. The path continues upward toward a massive twisted tree archway that looms ahead in the dense fog, with a second lamp post providing light on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty forest path that gradually leads toward a mysterious stone cottage and a looming tree archway. It begins with the character walking past a lit iron lamp post and a stone wall, surrounded by bare twisted trees and a dense blue-purple fog. As the wall and lamp post recede, the environment opens up to reveal white flowers and distant lights before a stone cottage with glowing windows emerges from the mist on the right. The scene then shifts as the character approaches the cottage and ascends stone steps, passing a dark figure perched ominously on the chimney. Finally, the path leads upward toward a massive twisted tree archway that looms ahead in the fog, illuminated by a second lamp post on the left.
